title: Mario 64 Paintings
body:
This datapack adds all of the level paintings (plus the japanese version of Jolly Roger Bay) as paintings to minecraft.

All you have to do is add the datapack to your world and add the resourcepack to your game.

All paintings are 4x4 blocks and will be placed at random just like placing a normal painting.

_**NOTICE: This datapack requires the use of a resourcepack. You can either use the standalone linked with the download, or the compiled pack if you plan to use this with my other datapacks.**_

<sub><sup>All assets in the resourcepack are owned by Nintendo!</sup></sub>
